# SKLabelHorizontalAlignmentMode.left

**Case**

Positions the text so that the left side of the text is on the node’s origin.

## Declaration

```swift
case left
```

## Constants

- **SKLabelHorizontalAlignmentMode.center**: Centers the text horizontally on the node’s origin.
- **SKLabelHorizontalAlignmentMode.right**: Positions the text so that the right side of the text is on the node’s origin.

items.description: Centers the text horizontally on the node’s origin.
